pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh, verifier.py, and setup_task.sh which all use this explicit path.

privileged_info_summary: The task expects the agent to create a new PsychoPy script saved exactly at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/simple_rt.py. The file must contain valid PsychoPy syntax including specific module imports, a Window, a TextStim with 'Press SPACE', waitKeys, and a close/quit command. A VLM will visually confirm that the code was written in the PsychoPy Coder view.
